fix-settings-stale-slider-2026-07-14.description: Fix SettingsWindow_Closing using stale slider value instead of actual mainWindow brightness/temp. 0 errors, 0 warnings.

perf-geometry-cache-2026-07-14.description: Cache EllipseGeometry+CombinedGeometry per context (eliminates ~250 allocs/sec on mouse move) + static JsonSerializerOptions in AppSettings.Save(). 0 errors, 0 warnings.

improve-dedup-2026-07-14.description: Extract ComputeTemperatureColor/ApplyTemperatureColorToBrush helpers; promote FrameThickness/FrameOuterRadius/FrameInnerRadius to class constants. 0 errors, 0 warnings.

test-comprehensive-suite-2026-07-13.description: 64 xUnit tests for all 8 AppSettings properties + Validate() clamping fix. All tests pass.

fix-shadow-color-temp-2026-07-13.description: Sync DropShadowEffect glow colour with colour temperature (main window + additional monitors). 0 errors, 0 warnings.

fix-initial-color-temp-additional-monito.description: Fix CreateMonitorWindow gradient init to use _colorTemperature instead of hardcoded white. 0 errors, 0 warnings.

fix-persist-all-monitors-2026-07-12.description: Persist showOnAllMonitors in AppSettings; restore on startup. 0 errors, 0 warnings.

eng-global-json-2026-07-12.description: Add global.json to pin .NET SDK to 10.0.x with latestMinor rollForward. 0 errors, 0 warnings.

docs-update-readme-2026-07-11.description: Update README: remove stale primary monitor only claim, add Settings/persistence features.

fix-monitor-index-2026-07-10.description: Prevent IndexOutOfRangeException when monitors are unplugged. 0 errors, 0 warnings.

perf-mouse-coalesce-2026-07-06.description: Coalesce mouse hook dispatches with Interlocked.CompareExchange.

maintainer_preferences: Prefers bug fixes and functional improvements. Closed refactoring PRs as not_planned. Does not want pure refactors without user-visible benefit.

known_limitations.pr_creation: GitHub Actions cannot create PRs - needs Settings > Actions > General > Allow GitHub Actions to create and approve pull requests
known_limitations.workflow_files: GitHub Actions cannot push .github/workflows/ files - needs workflows permission.
known_limitations.build: Project targets net10.0-windows; build requires -p:EnableWindowsTargeting=true on Linux CI. Test project targets net8.0 to avoid this.

notes: 2026-07-14 run (13:11 UTC): Tasks 8+3. Task 8: cached EllipseGeometry+CombinedGeometry in ApplyHolePunchEffect (eliminates ~250 GC allocs/sec on mouse move), cached static JsonSerializerOptions in AppSettings.Save(). Task 3: fixed SettingsWindow_Closing using stale slider value overwriting hotkey/toolbar changes - now uses mainWindow.GetBrightness()/GetColorTemperature() as source of truth.
